WALMART PRICE API - SETUP (10 min to apply, 3-7 days approval)

  Step 1: Go to https://affiliates.walmart.com → Click "Join Now"
  (It redirects to Impact.com — that's normal)

  Step 2: Create an Impact.com account with your business email

  Step 3: Fill out the application:
  - Business type: "Content / Blog / Website" or "Technology / Software"
  - How you'll promote: "Price comparison"
  - Categories: Health, Household, Beauty, Toys
  - Submit

  Step 4: Wait 3-7 days for approval email from Impact.com

messages.subject: Fwd: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises
messages.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <sharon@dynamicdis.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 3, 2026 at 1:16 PM
Subject: Re: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises
To: belgianotaatjes@gmail.com <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com>
CC: Mary - Dynamic Distributors <mary@dynamicdis.com>, Monica - Dynamic
Distributors <monica@dynamicdis.com>


 Hi Taatjes,





Following up. Here's what we have right now in HBA and general merchandise
— full list attached. Prestige beauty brands like Clinique, Urban Decay,
Elizabeth Arden, and Rare Beauty all at closeout pricing. Also have
 Farberware candles and some games/toys.





We don't have OTC or vitamins right now but I'll flag those when they come
in. Any particular brands or categories you're looking for? I'll keep them
on my radar.



 Sharon

------------------------------
*From:* Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <sharon@dynamicdis.com>
*Sent:* Tuesday, March 31, 2026 7:57 AM
*To:* belgianotaatjes@gmail.com <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com>
*Cc:* Mary - Dynamic Distributors <mary@dynamicdis.com>
*Subject:* Re: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises

(Adding other members of the sales team)

Hi,

Thanks for the details on your channels and focus, that is very helpful. I
will check with the team to pull a tight list of current fast-moving HBA,
OTC, and general merchandise that fit your online and mixed-channel
business, and we will follow up for you to review.

Best,
Sharon


On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 08:13 AM <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com> wrote:

Hi Sharon,


Great meeting you at ASD as well, I appreciate you reaching out.


We primarily sell through online channels (Amazon/Walmart), with some
retail and export mixed in depending on the deal. We tend to focus heavily
on fast-moving items in HBA, OTC, and general merchandise.


If you can send over a tight list of what you have available right now,
that would be great—especially anything with strong turns and clean pricing.


Looking forward to taking a look.


Best,

Taatjes

On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 7:10 AM Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <
sharon@dynamicdis.com> wrote:

We rotate inventory a lot, so what is available today can be gone fast.

If you tell me what channel you sell in most (retail store, online, or
both), I will send a tight list that fits, with pricing and pack sizes.

Which one is it?

Sharon


On Wed, Mar 25, 2026 at 07:06 PM <sharon@dynamicdis.com> wrote:

Hi Taatjes,

Thanks again for stopping by our booth at ASD last week. From what I saw
online, Keith Enterprises keeps things broad, so I wanted to share a quick
intro.

Dynamic Distributors is a U.S. closeout and surplus wholesaler. We move
fast-turn inventory in general merchandise, beauty, fragrance, apparel, and
electronics. It is all authentic, and we ship quick.

If you tell me your top 2 categories, I can send a short list of what is
available right now.

Want me to send that over?

Sharon

messages.subject: How to port your number(s) out of Quo
messages.body:
Quo's logo ( https://www.quo.com/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Hey Taatjes,

You're receiving this email because your Quo subscription is no longer active.

Please note that without an active subscription, any phone number not ported to a new carrier will be released back into circulation after 14 days.

If you'd like to reactivate your subscription, you can follow the steps here ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/billing/managing-your-subscription?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) to do so.

Or, if you'd like to port your number to a new carrier, follow the instructions here ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/porting-out?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ). If you've already begun the porting process, or have recently renewed your Quo subscription ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/billing/managing-your-subscription?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ), feel free to disregard this email.

If you have any questions or believe you've received this email by mistake, please feel free to reply to this email.

Thanks,
The Quo Team

Quo logo ( https://www.quo.com/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Reddit ( https://www.reddit.com/r/quo/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
Twitter ( https://x.com/gowithquo?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
YouTube ( https://www.youtube.com/@gowithquo?sub_confirmation=1&utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

scan_results.product_name: NAD+ Supplement with Nicotinamide Riboside, Resveratrol & Quercetin
scan_results.description: A multi-ingredient longevity and cellular health supplement combining Nicotinamide Riboside (NR) for NAD+ boosting, Trans-Resveratrol for antioxidant and anti-aging support, and Quercetin as a senolytic and anti-inflammatory flavonoid. Targets the growing anti-aging and longevity supplement market.
scan_results.amazon_category_guess: Health, Household & Personal Care > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Anti-Aging Supplements
key_selling_points: All-in-one NAD+ longevity stack — combines NR, Resveratrol, and Quercetin in a single capsule
Targets cellular energy and healthy aging backed by emerging longevity research
Quercetin acts as a natural senolytic to support clearing of senescent cells
Resveratrol provides potent antioxidant and cardiovascular support
Appeals to the David Sinclair / Bryan Johnson longevity-conscious consumer demographic
scan_results.notes: Listed on Amazon Australia (.com.au). Found via 'NAD supplement' search keywords, appearing as a sponsored result (position 2), indicating active PPC spend. The NAD+/longevity supplement category is highly competitive with established brands like Tru Niagen (ChromaDex), Elysium Basis, and ProHealth Longevity. The combination formula (NR + Resveratrol + Quercetin) is a common private-label stack pattern. ASIN prefix B0DQ suggests a relatively recent listing (late 2024 / early 2025). The sponsored placement and multi-ingredient approach suggest a private-label or newer brand trying to differentiate through ingredient bundling rather than brand recognition.
